description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with grass, shrubs, and several trees. The structure features large, rectangular windows on multiple sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a garage, with a paved walkway connecting to the main entrance. The exterior walls are a mix of white and dark gray, creating a contemporary aesthetic. The backyard is enclosed and features additional greenery, while the side yards are bordered by hedges. The overall layout is open and functional, with clear separation between living spaces and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and dark gray exterior, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped yards.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angled side, highlighting the backyard, wooden fence, and a portion of the driveway and main entrance.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct front view, emphasizing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping with hedges and trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the bungalow from the opposite side, focusing on the backyard, wooden fence, and the side of the house with grouped windows.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a rear perspective, showcasing the enclosed backyard, rear windows, and the line of trees along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
